question.title: [SYNTHETIC FIXTURE] What will the example index value be on 2026-07-15?
question.description: Synthetic fixture question for offline tests. Shaped like a MiniBench numeric question; never submitted anywhere.
question.resolution_criteria: Resolves to the example index closing value on 2026-07-15 as published by the example source.
question.fine_print: If no value is published that day, the question resolves to the next published value.
